name: Luenell
bio: Luenell is an American stand-up comedian and actress known for her bawdy, fearless club work and a devoted live following that earned her the nickname the Original Bad Girl of Comedy. She broke through to wider audiences with a role in the 2006 film Borat, then continued touring as a headliner while building a screen career. Her comedy mixes blunt sexual material with warm, big-room crowd command.

timeline.ev: Begins appearing on Oakland public-access station Soul Beat
First film role in So I Married an Axe Murderer
Featured role in the film Borat
Inducted into the Arkansas Black Hall of Fame

accolades: Inducted into the Arkansas Black Hall of Fame (2015)
Longtime national touring headliner billed as the Original Bad Girl of Comedy

specials.t: So I Married an Axe Murderer
